subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1912-04-01
subcodes.first_line: Those who have provided the means for transporting arms and ammunition and the instruments of wars and massacres on earth will do so in the air.
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه در زمین اسباب حمل و نقل آلات و اسباب حرب و قتال ساخته اند در هوا نیز چنان خواهند
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @war and peace, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology
